info.description: REST API for HR Platform with Bulgarian payroll
info.title: HR Platform API

get.description: List all API keys for the authenticated user

post.description: Generate a new API key for the authenticated user

delete.description: Deactivate an API key by ID

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT access and refresh tokens
Exchange a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens

get.description: List contracts with optional employee filter and pagination
Retrieve a single contract by ID
List employees with optional search, department filter, and pagination

post.description: Create a new employee in the HR system

get.description: Retrieve a single employee by their Odoo ID
List leave allocations with optional employee filter
List leave requests with optional employee and status filter

post.description: Reject a pending leave request with optional reason

get.description: List payroll runs with optional status filter and pagination

post.description: Create a new payroll run for a date period

get.description: Retrieve payroll run details and processing status

post.description: Approve a draft payroll run for processing
Trigger async payroll processing, returns 202 with poll URL

get.description: List payslips for a specific payroll run
Retrieve a single payslip by UUID

post.description: Confirm a payslip has been reviewed

get.description: Generate payroll summary for a date period
Generate tax liabilities breakdown for a date period

post.description: Register a new webhook endpoint for event notifications

delete.description: Deactivate a webhook registration by ID

get.description: List delivery attempts for a specific webhook
